name: repository-wide agent readiness audit activates

input.request: Run a repository-wide audit of the controls governing agent edits, tests, commits, and pull requests. Use the strict report template and no more than two disjoint control-plane subagents. Do not audit application correctness or production readiness.
input.context: The repository has instructions, hooks, CI workflows, skill evaluations, and packaging controls.

expected_behavior: establish an immutable baseline and explicit repository-wide scope
use no more than two disjoint control-plane workstreams when justified
record command safety, evidence IDs, unknowns, and skipped checks
complete the strict report template with fail-closed autonomy gates
